camera_unavailable: Kamaraddu ma shaqeynayso — isticmaal “Dooro sawir” bedelkeeda.
scan_no_matches: Lama helin badeecooyin ka mid ah kaydka la mid ah
scan_error: Lama aqoonsan karin badeecooyinka. Isku day mar kale ama gacanta ku dar.
submit_save_error: Hagaajinta lama kaydin karin — fadlan isku day mar kale.
submit_failed: Gudbinta way fashilantay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
search_placeholder: Raadi si aad shay ugu darto…
search_no_matches: Lama helin — isku day magac ama SKU kale
empty_rows: Weli alaab ma jirto — sawir riixad ama raadi si aad badeecooyin ugu darto.
scan_hint: Kamaradda ku toosi riixadda — alaabta la aqoonsaday ayaa lagu darayaa tirintaada.
